question:
[Previous Feedback] Daily report generated with all time fields correctly formatted.

Please create day03/event_timeline.json to arrange today's anomaly events in chronological order. Each event should include event_id, occurred_at, severity (low/medium/high/critical), and status (open/resolved). Add a final 'report generated' event at the end of the array with occurred_at set to the current time (around 10:30).

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 11:12 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Daily report generated with all time fields correctly formatted.

Please create day03/event_timeline.json to arrange today's anomaly events in chronological order. Each event should include event_id, occurred_at, severity (low/medium/high/critical), and status (open/resolved). Add a final 'report generated' event at the end of the array with occurred_at set to the current time (around 10:30).
I'll create the event timeline with all anomaly events arranged chronologically, including severity levels and status for each.
